task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Bahmni clinical system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen, app menu, or clinical dashboard is visible, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for and selected the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or clinical view is open, and the name 'Kevin Peterson' is clearly visible in the patient banner or header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the section to edit or record the patient's vitals/observations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is on the consultation, vitals entry, or observation edit screen where the patient's weight can be modified.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct weight value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '85' is typed into the weight input field (replacing or correcting the erroneous '850' value).

task_completion.description: Verify the corrected weight is saved and the erroneous weight is no longer the active value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's recent vitals, dashboard, or observation summary shows '85' kg as the current weight, and '850' kg is no longer listed as the active/current weight.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the Bahmni system through a standard web browser interface, not using terminal commands, curl, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the genuine Bahmni application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Bahmni EMR interface with its standard layout, patient banners, and styling, rather than a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing direct database queries (e.g., MySQL) or backend scripts used to update the patient's weight.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Kevin Peterson. Erroneous Weight: 850 kg. Correct Weight: 85 kg. Weight Concept UUID: 5089AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA (standard Weight (kg) concept). The VLM must ensure the final state shows 85 kg as the active weight for Kevin Peterson in the Bahmni UI, and that the physically impossible 850 kg value has been successfully corrected or removed from the active vitals.
